text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fated third year—Mayano Top Gun will surely
face many a challenge in her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I'm positive she'll emerge victorious.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Why the stern face, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: We're on a shrine date. You should be smiling! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha! That's 'cause I'm having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You see, I've already decided on my goal for this
year. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This is the year I come out on top... I'll beat Brian
even if she runs with all she's got!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I've been thinking about a lot of things, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...That's what I wanna do the most!
choice_data_list: I'm sure your wish will come true.
I'm sure your wish will come true.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heehee. I think so too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I watch her smile, I give it some more thought.
choice_data_list: I want you to stay healthy.
I want you to learn a lot and grow.
I want you to become a spectacular adult.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm? What did you just say, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! That's no fair! You can't make your wish
before I do!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Let's start over! We have to make our wishes
together!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once we make our wishes, we can move on with
our date! ♪ Right? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from the shrine, we make a
quick stop at a food stall for lunch before
heading home.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha! You're making that face again.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmm, it's hard to explain...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It’s like you're thinking "I wonder what I can do
for Maya," or "I want to take care of Maya!"

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I see you make that face, it gets my
engines going. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All right, I got it! Let's start our first training
session of the year! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish the year's first training session without a
hitch.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's not a good wish at all!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna become a spectacular and mature
woman! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, they're totally different! The difference
between an adult and a mature woman is...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm, good question.
choice_data_list: So you don't know either, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's not it! They're totally different! They have
to be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I find Mayano Top Gun at the
library with her nose deep in a dictionary.
